9:T59f9,<div class="specification">
<p>As part of a study into healthy lifestyles, Jing visited Surrey Hills University. Jing recorded a person’s position in the university and how frequently they ate a salad. Results are shown in the table.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">Jing conducted a <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\chi " xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mi>χ<!-- χ --></mi>
</math></span><sup>2</sup> test for independence at a 5 % level of significance.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the null hypothesis.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Calculate the <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="p" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mi>p</mi>
</math></span>-value for this test.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State, giving a reason, whether the null hypothesis should be accepted.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>a:T4c6,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>number of salad meals per week is independent of a person’s position in the university  <em><strong>A1</strong></em></p>
<p><strong>Note:</strong> Accept “not associated” instead of independent.</p>
<p><em><strong>[1 mark]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>0.0201 (0.0201118…)  <em><strong>A2</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>[2 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>0.0201 &lt; 0.05        <em><strong>R1</strong></em></p>
<p>the null hypothesis is rejected        <em><strong>A1</strong></em><br/><br/><strong>Note:</strong> Award <em><strong>(R1)</strong></em> for a correct comparison of their <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="p" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mi>p</mi>
</math></span>-value to the test level, award <em><strong>(A1)</strong></em> for the correct interpretation from that comparison.</p>
<p>Do not award<em><strong> (R0)(A1)</strong></em>.</p>
<p><em><strong>[2 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/topic/4/","children":["← back to topic ","4"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"SPM.1.SL.TZ0.6"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"AI"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"SPM"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","sl-4-11-expected-observed-hypotheses-chi-squared-gof-t-test"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$9"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
